detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLSnapshotResult codes.
Derivatives not calculated for requested coordinate frame.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Return values for Snapshot API calls.
Return values for Snapshot API calls.

briefdescription.para: Velocity and acceleration derivatives for a related transform.
Static information about the snapshot system.

detaileddescription.para: Initalize this structure with MLSnapshotStaticDataInit and populate with MLSnapshotGetStaticData().

briefdescription.para: Intializes the default values for MLTransformDerivatives.

parameterdescription.para: The object that will be initialized with default values.

briefdescription.para: Intializes the default values for MLSnapshotStaticData.

parameterdescription.para: The object that will be initialized with default values.

briefdescription.para: Get the static data pertaining to the snapshot system.

parameterdescription.para: Target to populate the data about snapshot system.
Failed to obtain static data due to invalid parameter.
Obtained static data successfully.
Failed to obtain static data due to internal error.

briefdescription.para: Get transform between world origin and the coordinate frame id.

parameterdescription.para: A snapshot of tracker state. Can be obtained with MLPerceptionGetSnapshot().
Look up the transform between the current origin and this coordinate frame id.
Valid pointer to a MLTransform. To be filled out with requested transform data.
Failed to obtain transform due to invalid parameter.
Obtained transform successfully.
Coordinate Frame is valid, but not found in the current pose snapshot.
Failed to obtain transform due to internal error.

briefdescription.para: Get transform between world origin and the coordinate frame id as well as any derivatives that have been calculated.

parameterdescription.para: A snapshot of tracker state. Can be obtained with MLPerceptionGetSnapshot().
Look up the transform between the current origin and this coordinate frame id.
Valid pointer to a MLTransform. To be filled out with requested transform data.
Valid pointer to a MLTransformDerivatives. To be filled out with the derivatives of the transform if available.
Failed to obtain transform due to invalid parameter.
Obtained transform successfully.
Coordinate Frame is valid, but not found in the current pose snapshot.
Failed to obtain transform due to internal error.
Derivatives are not available for the requested coordinate Frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MLSnapshot *snapshot, const MLCoordinateFrameUID *base_id, const MLCoordinateFrameUID *id, MLPose *out_pose)
memberdef.name: MLSnapshotGetPoseInBase

briefdescription.para: Get transform between coordinate frame 'base_id' and the coordinate frame id as well as any derivatives that have been calculated.

parameterdescription.para: A snapshot of tracker state. Can be obtained with MLPerceptionGetSnapshot().
The coordinate frame in which to locate 'id'.
The coordinate frame which needs to be located in the base_id coordinate frame.
Valid pointer to a MLPose. To be filled out with requested pose data.
Failed to obtain transform due to invalid parameter.
Obtained transform successfully.
Coordinate Frame is valid, but not found in the current pose snapshot.
Failed to obtain transform due to internal error.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string representation for each result code.

detaileddescription.para: This call returns strings for all of the global MLResult and MLSnapshotResult codes.

parameterdescription.para: MLResult type to be converted to string.

simplesect.para: ASCII string containing readable version of the result code.
